context: Action:   vasoconstriction, increased cardiac output ♦  Epinephrine ⇒  1 mL glass vial of epinephrine 1:1,000 Adult dose:   0.1-0.2 mL epinephrine (1:1,000 = 0.1-0.2 mg) SQ Pediatric dose:   0.01 mL/kg up to 0.3 mL/dose ⇒  repeat in 15-30 minutes if needed Indications:   bronchospasm, facial edema, severe urticaria, laryngospasm ⇒  10-mL syringe of epinephrine 1÷10,000 (prepackaged) Adult dose:   1-3 mL epinephrine (1÷10,000) (= 0.1 mg) slowly IV Pediatric dose:   0.1 mL/kg slowly IV ⇒  repeat every 5-15 minutes if needed Indications:   bronchospasm / laryngospasm with peripheral vascular coll
